
Then:

$$\red{\beta_{0}} = \eta(\red{P=0},\red{A=0})$${#eq-wcgs-intxn-beta0}

$$
\ba
\red{\beta_A}
&= \deriv{a}\eta(\red{P=0}, A = a)
\\&= \eta(\red{P = 0}, A = a + 1)- \eta(\red{P = 0}, A = a)
\ea
$${#eq-wcgs-intxn-betaA}

$$\red{\b_P} = \eta(P = 1, \red{A = 0}) - \eta(P=0, \red{A = 0})$${#eq-wcgs-intxn-betaP}

$$
\ba
\red{\beta_{PA}}
&= \deriv{a}\eta(P=1, A = a) - \deriv{a}\eta(P=0, A = a)
\\
&= \sb{\eta(1,a + 1)- \eta(1, a)} -
\sb{\eta(0,a + 1)- \eta(0, a)}
\\
&= \sb{\eta(1,a + 1)- \eta(0,a + 1)} -
\sb{\eta(1, a)- \eta(0, a)}
\ea
$${#eq-wcgs-intxn-betaPA}
